parameters.jsCode:
const items = $('Read Enriched Jobs').all();
const enriched = items.filter(i => (i.json.status || '').trim().toLowerCase() === 'enriched');
if (enriched.length === 0) throw new Error('No enriched jobs found');

const keywordToTab = {
  'AI Engineer': 'Master Resume - AI Engineer',
  'AI ML Engineer': 'Master Resume - AI Engineer',
  'Agentic AI Automation Engineer': 'Master Resume - AI Engineer',
  'Process Automation Engineer': 'Master Resume - AI Engineer',
  'AI Adoption Specialist': 'Master Resume - AI Adoption',
  'AI Adoption Manager': 'Master Resume - AI Adoption',
  'Digital Transformation Manager': 'Master Resume - AI Adoption',
  'Digital & Process Lead': 'Master Resume - AI Adoption',
  'AI Change Manager': 'Master Resume - AI Adoption',
  'AI Implementation Specialist': 'Master Resume - AI Adoption',
  'ISO 9001 Quality Manager': 'Master Resume - Quality Manager',
  'Quality Assurance Manager': 'Master Resume - Quality Manager',
  'Quality Manager': 'Master Resume - Quality Manager',
  'Continuous Improvement Specialist': 'Master Resume - Process Improvement',
  'Continuous Improvement Manager': 'Master Resume - Process Improvement',
  'Lean Six Sigma': 'Master Resume - Process Improvement',
  'Process Improvement Analyst': 'Master Resume - Process Analyst',
  'Operations Improvement Manager': 'Master Resume - Process Analyst',
  'Operations Improvement Analyst': 'Master Resume - Process Analyst',
  'Change Manager': 'Master Resume - Change Manager',
  'Organisational Change Manager': 'Master Resume - Change Manager',
  'Change & Transformation Lead': 'Master Resume - Change Manager',
  'Business Transformation Manager': 'Master Resume - Change Manager',
  'HubSpot Specialist': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'HubSpot Consultant': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'CRM Specialist': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'CRM Manager': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'CRM Consultant': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'Marketing Automation Specialist': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'Revenue Operations Specialist': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'Sales Operations Specialist': 'Master Resume - HubSpot Consultant',
  'Event Manager': 'Master Resume - Event Manager',
  'Event Coordinator': 'Master Resume - Event Manager',
  'Event Program Officer': 'Master Resume - Event Manager',
  'Events Manager': 'Master Resume - Event Manager',
  'Events Coordinator': 'Master Resume - Event Manager',
  'Conference Manager': 'Master Resume - Event Manager',
  'Marketing Events Manager': 'Master Resume - Event Manager'
};

return enriched.slice(0, 5).map(i => {
  const kw = (i.json.search_keywords || '').trim();
  const resume_tab = keywordToTab[kw] || 'Master Resume';
  return { json: { ...i.json, resume_tab } };
});

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_job_id: $json.job_id, p_title: $json.title, p_company_name: $json.company_name, p_location: $json.location || '', p_industry: '', p_status: $json.status, p_fit_score: $json.fit_score, p_content: '', p_metadata: { resume_markdown: $json.resume_markdown, resume_html: $json.resume_html, tailoring_rationale: $json.tailoring_rationale, fit_rationale: $json.fit_rationale, matched_requirements: $json.matched_requirements, missing_requirements: $json.missing_requirements }, p_embedding: null }) }}
